basic_details.job_title: TMC ACTREC Engineer Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.organization_name: Tata Memorial Centre – ACTREC, Navi Mumbai
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Centre – ACTREC is recruiting an experienced Mechanical Engineer on contract basis through A-1 Facility and Property Managers Pvt Ltd. for maintenance and project execution works.

important_dates.venue: Ground Floor, Pushp Building, TMC-ACTREC, Sec-22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai

age_limit.age_details: Up to 35 Years (relaxable based on experience)

qualification.details: B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering (First Class) from AICTE approved institute with minimum 05 years post-qualification experience OR Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (First Class) with 07 years post-qualification experience. | Preference will be given to candidates having experience in execution of Hospital / Commercial / High Rise residential building projects. | Willingness to work in shift duties including nights, Sundays, and holidays is mandatory.

how_to_apply: Candidates must walk-in for interview on 24 July 2026 at the specified venue with:
Scanned copies of Aadhaar Card, PAN Card
Original + Self-attested copies of qualification marksheets, certificates, and experience certificates
important_instructions: This is a contract position through outsourced agency. No TA/DA will be provided. Candidates should be ready for shift duties.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Engineer (Mechanical) Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Tata Memorial Centre – ACTREC is recruiting an experienced Mechanical Engineer on contract basis through A-1 Facility and Property Managers Pvt Ltd. for maintenance and project execution works.

rows.tata_memorial_centre_actrec_navi_mumbai: A-1 Facility and Property Managers Pvt Ltd.
Up to 35 Years (relaxable based on experience)

rows.date: Ground Floor, Pushp Building, TMC-ACTREC, Sec-22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai

content_sections.heading: Essential Qualification & Experience
content_sections.text: B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering (First Class) from AICTE approved institute with minimum 05 years post-qualification experience OR Diploma in Mechanical Engineering (First Class) with 07 years post-qualification experience. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in execution of Hospital / Commercial / High Rise residential building projects. Willingness to work in shift duties including nights, Sundays, and holidays is mandatory.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ACTREC Engineer (Mechanical) Walk-in 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must walk-in for interview on 24 July 2026 at the specified venue with: Bio-data Recent passport size photograph Scanned copies of Aadhaar Card, PAN Card Original + Self-attested copies of qualification marksheets, certificates, and experience certificates

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This is a contract position through outsourced agency. No TA/DA will be provided. Candidates should be ready for shift duties.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for ACTREC Engineer (Mechanical) 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is on 24 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Mechanical Engineer at ACTREC Navi Mumbai?
faq.answer: Consolidated salary ranges from ₹50,000/- to ₹65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum experience required for ACTREC Mechanical Engineer post?
faq.answer: 5 years for B.E./B.Tech or 7 years for Diploma holders.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for ACTREC Engineer (Mechanical) vacancy?
faq.answer: Up to 35 years (relaxable based on experience).

faq.question: Q5. Is B.Tech required for ACTREC Kharghar Mechanical Engineer job?
faq.answer: Yes, Full-time B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering with First Class is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in venue for ACTREC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Ground Floor, Pushp Building, TMC-ACTREC, Sec-22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for ACTREC Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Bio-data, photo, Aadhaar, PAN, original + self-attested qualification and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q8. Is the ACTREC Engineer position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is on contract basis for 6 months (extendable).

faq.question: Q9. Will candidates get preference for hospital project experience at ACTREC?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates with experience in Hospital, Commercial, or High-Rise building projects.

faq.question: Q10. What are the working hours for ACTREC Mechanical Engineer?
faq.answer: Candidates must be willing to work in shift duties including nights, Sundays, and holidays.
